task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris main menu or loading screen is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Geography puzzle activity
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris interface shows the geography or map puzzle selection menu.
The South America map puzzle is loaded and visible in the GCompris window, showing the outline of the continent.

task_completion.description: Place at least 4 countries in their correct positions
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least 4 distinct South American countries are snapped into their correct geographical positions on the map, rather than sitting in the side panel or floating incorrectly.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the completed map to /home/ga/geography_result.png
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (e.g., using gnome-screenshot, scrot, or import) or a GUI screenshot tool is used to save the screen specifically to the path '/home/ga/geography_result.png', or a file manager/image viewer shows the file existing at this exact path.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GCompris GUI to complete the puzzle
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show intermediate steps of the agent dragging and dropping country puzzle pieces within the GCompris application.

integrity.description: The agent did not download a pre-completed map image from the internet
integrity.visual_evidence: No web browser is open searching for 'South America map', and no terminal commands like wget or curl are used to download an image.

integrity.description: The saved screenshot is a genuine capture of the agent's gameplay
integrity.visual_evidence: The final image saved to '/home/ga/geography_result.png' visually matches the exact state of the GCompris application seen in the agent's previous actions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: The final screenshot must be saved exactly to the path '/home/ga/geography_result.png'. The agent must successfully place a minimum of 4 countries in their correct positions on the map for the task to be considered successful.
